subcodes.first_line: The Book hath spoken before the Face that which the Bayán spoke in this perspicuous Remembrance. Say: This is a Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق الکتاب امام الوجه بما نطق البیان فی هذا الذکر المبین قل هذا ظهور لیس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @station of the Manifestation of God
